operators.description: Matches values exactly.

diagnostics.summary: Use when the field must match exactly.
commonMistakes: Using eq when wildcard matching is intended.
Using a value format that does not match the field type.

operators.description: Excludes exact matches.

diagnostics.summary: Use when the field must not match the provided value.
commonMistakes: Using ne when a null check is actually intended.
Assuming ne behaves the same as not-null.

operators.description: Matches values greater than the supplied value.

diagnostics.summary: Use for numeric or date/datetime comparisons where the field must be greater than the provided value.
notes: Commonly used for dates and numeric thresholds.
commonMistakes: Providing a value format that does not match the field type.

operators.description: Matches values greater than or equal to the supplied value.
Matches values less than the supplied value.
Matches values less than or equal to the supplied value.
Matches values on the supplied date or datetime.

diagnostics.summary: Use for exact date or datetime matching.

operators.description: Matches values on or after the supplied date or datetime.
Matches values on or before the supplied date or datetime.
Matches values within an inclusive lower and upper bound.

diagnostics.summary: Use when a field must fall within a range.

operators.description: Excludes values within the supplied lower and upper bound.
Matches records where the field has no value.

diagnostics.summary: Checks whether the field is empty.
commonMistakes: Providing a value when the operator does not take one.
Using null when not-null is intended.

operators.description: Matches records where the field has a value.

diagnostics.summary: Checks whether the field is populated.
commonMistakes: Providing a value when the operator does not take one.
Using not-null when ne is intended.

operators.description: Matches text using wildcard patterns.

commonMistakes: Forgetting to include wildcard characters when partial matching is intended.

operators.description: Excludes values matching a wildcard pattern.
Matches values starting with the provided text.
Matches values ending with the provided text.
Excludes values that begin with the provided text.
Excludes values that end with the provided text.
Matches any of the provided values.

diagnostics.summary: Checks whether the field matches one of several values.
commonMistakes: Supplying only a single scalar value when multiple values are expected.
Treating in as equivalent to eq.

operators.description: Excludes records matching any of the provided values.
Matches multi-select choice fields containing any of the provided values.

diagnostics.summary: Use for multi-select choice containment checks.

operators.description: Excludes multi-select choice fields containing any of the provided values.
